last_episode_to_air.name: Sisters War (2)
last_episode_to_air.overview: With desperation increasing, things become tense amongst the sisters as well as with Futaro. For their elective tour on the last day of the school trip, the quintuplets decide to keep things fair by leaving the outcome to luck.

name: The Quintessential Quintuplets
overview: Fuutarou Uesugi is a poor, antisocial ace student who one day meets the rich transfer student Itsuki Nakano. They argue but when Uesugi realizes he is to be her tutor, he tries to get on better terms. While trying to do so he meets four other girls.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Uesugi Fuutarou, a high school second-year from a poor family, receives a highly appealing offer to work part-time as a tutor... but his students turn out to be girls from his own class! What's more, they're quintuplets... and all five are beautiful, but happen to be problem students who have borderline grades and hate studying! Looks like his first assignment will be to win all the sisters' trust?! Every day is a wild party in this rom-com centering around the quintuplet sisters of the Nakano household!

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Futaro already has his hands full with the quintuplets, but when his first love shows up out of nowhere, things get even more complicated. From costumes to competition, how each of the sisters tries to win him over may just seal their fate—and his!
